title: Sterling Bank of Asia Selects Infosys Finacle SaaS Platform for Banking Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced on June 25, 2026 that Sterling Bank of Asia selected the Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program. Sterling Bank plans to use Finacle Core Banking, Customer Data Hub, Trade Finance, and Origination solutions. The bank expects the platform to improve employee and customer experience, maintain availability and reliability, reduce operational complexity through automation and digitization, and support future growth through cloud-hosted scalability, periodic upgrades, security, and feature enhancements. No deal value or contract duration was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Sterling Bank of Asia selected the Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program.
Sterling Bank opted to use Finacle Core Banking, Finacle Customer Data Hub, Finacle Trade Finance, and Finacle Origination solutions.
Sterling Bank expects the collaboration to enhance employee and customer experience, maintain high availability and reliability, and reduce operational complexity through automation and digitization.
The SaaS-based deployment is expected to simplify technology operations and allow Sterling Bank to focus on strategic growth and innovation.
The cloud-hosted model is expected to help Sterling Bank scale seamlessly and on demand to support evolving business needs.
Infosys Finacle described the collaboration as another example of Finacle's growing presence in the Philippines.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Sterling Bank of Asia selected Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program, including Finacle Core Banking, Customer Data Hub, Trade Finance, and Origination solutions.

important_text_spans.text: With Finacle SaaS, tailored for the Philippine market, Sterling Bank of Asia will gain a modern, customer-first digital banking platform to help position the bank for long-term success.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the strategic relevance of Finacle SaaS in the Philippine banking market.
